doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The 5-day notice rule and citation to 735 ILCS 5/9-209 are real, but the statute was renamed the Eviction Article in 2017, the email-service language is not in the actual statute, and this reads as a paraphrase rather than authentic statuto
response_turn1:
